title: Would like to be able to have more than 500 columns on a single board
excerpt: Currently, there is a limit of 500 columns per board. Would be great if you can increase this limit to something higher like 750 or 1,000. This is a very high priority for out team.

posts.author: KishorePWP (Kishore)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently, there is a limit of 500 columns per board. Would be great if you can increase this limit to something higher like 750 or 1,000. This is a very high priority for out team.
